item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Mr. and Mrs. Longval would like to congratulate all junior and senior badminton players on their strong performances at recent tournaments in the Prescott-Russell Tier 2 Badminton League. A special congratulations to Seth S and Jesse S for capturing 1st place in Senior Boys Doubles, and to Elena B.R. for earning 1st place in Senior Girls Singles. We also had several 2nd and 3rd place finishes. We are incredibly proud of the effort, sportsmanship, and growth shown by all of our athletes. A big thank you to our control table crew—Dylan, Landon, Alyssa, and Logan—for their help hosting the Junior Tournament at STA this week. Your support made a big difference! We would also like to wish our graduating Grade 12 students the very best of luck. We hope you continue to stay active and keep playing racquet sports throughout your post-secondary journey.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Attention all grade 9-12 students! 🏐 Sign-ups are now open for our Lunchtime Volleyball Tournament, a fundraiser to support our CrossFit team. Teams of 6 can register for $20, and games will take place during lunch next week. Spots are limited to 8 teams, so don’t wait! Come see Mrs. Longval at lunch in her office to register your team.
